name: Thumbprint Buttercreams
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ingredients well until combined.
2. Roll into small balls and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form, then dip each ball in the beaten egg white.
4. Dip each ball in chopped nuts.
5. Bake for 5 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
6. Remove from oven and press a thumbprint in the center of each cookie.
7. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 8 minutes, or until set.
8. Allow to cool completely before filling with buttercream icing.
